items.title: how to unpin all nodes in comfyui workflow
items.summary: Based on the docs, the “P” hotkey is designed to pin/unpin data for a single selected node [docs.n8n.io]( Keyboard shortcuts | n8n Docs ). For…
items.content_html:
Based on the docs, the “P” hotkey is designed to pin/unpin data for a single selected node [docs.n8n.io]( Keyboard shortcuts | n8n Docs ). For multiple nodes, you’ll need to unpin them individually since bulk operations aren’t supported via shortcuts.

A workaround:

1. Use “Ctrl+A” to select all nodes

2. Right-click any node → choose “Pin Data” from the context menu to toggle pinned state for all selected nodes

https://community.n8n.io/t/unpin-all-nodes-p-doesnt-work/217495

items.title: notes of a techno hippie
items.summary: I will be using this site to keep and organise things that i need for projects that i know will be useful for others and…
items.content_html: I will be using this site to keep and organise things that i need for projects that i know will be useful for others and myself as well... so when... after months have passed and i need to circle back to something. Guess what it will be here with a tag and easy to find.
